payload.label: oven
payload.long_description: Partial, close-up view of a stainless-steel oven lower front (approx. 0.8 m from camera) showing a black glass door window and a horizontal handle draped with a white tea towel; image is edge-cropped at the sides and bottom and shows brushed metallic finish with light reflections.
